---
title: "News"
description: "Updates from CogDyn Lab"
---

## 2026

### Website launched

**2026-06-19** — The CogDyn Lab website is now live at `https://cogdynlab.org`.

### Add your next update here

**2026-06-01** — Use this page for paper acceptances, conference presentations, awards, recruitment posts, seminars, grants, and lab events.

## News writing convention

Use a reverse-chronological order. Keep each item short: date, event, one-sentence context, and a link when available.
